description: Animate a continuous linear drift using extrapolation in the scene '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz'. Animate Column 1 moving to the right by setting keyframes at Frame 1 and Frame 20, then apply linear post-extrapolation so the movement continues indefinitely. Render Frame 20 to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/drift/frame0020.png' and Frame 60 to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/drift/frame0060.png'.
